name: Shiitake Mushroom, Sweet Potato & Hazelnut Sa
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Rice milk or soy milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in oil until lightly browned.
2. In a large pot, combine half of the onions with the salt, half teaspoon rosemary, sweet potatoes, and 1 1/2 cups stock. Cook until potatoes are tender.
3. Cool mixture to room temperature and blend with milk (or soy milk) and hazelnut butter until very smooth. Set aside.
4. Combine remaining onions, mushrooms, tamari, pepper, remaining rosemary, and 2 tablespoons water. Cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add the cooked mushroom mixture to the cooled sweet potato mixture and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Serve hot over fresh pasta. Note: Use only fresh shiitake mushrooms.
